com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.IMUErrors

Bug Category Details Line Priority
com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.IMUErrors.setAccelerometerBiases(double[]) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into IMUErrors.mAccelerometerBiases MALICIOUS_CODE EI_EXPOSE_REP2 468 Medium
com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.IMUErrors.setGyroBiases(double[]) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into IMUErrors.mGyroBiases MALICIOUS_CODE EI_EXPOSE_REP2 607 Medium
